API docs by Redocly

Ruins Editor API (0.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Items

Items_list

アイテム一覧取得

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/items

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "spriteSheetName": "string",
      • "spriteKey": "string",
      • "animKeys": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "value": 99999,
      • "weight": 1000,
      • "inflictsDamage": 9999,
      • "providesNutrition": 9999,
      • "stackable": true,
      • "consumable": {
        • "usableScene": "BATTLE",
        • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
        • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
        },
      • "providesHealing": {
        • "valueType": "PERCENTAGE",
        • "amount": 9999,
        • "ratio": 1
        },
      • "wearable": {
        • "defense": 999,
        • "equipmentCategory": "HEAD",
        • "insulationCold": -100,
        • "insulationHeat": -100
        },
      • "equipBonus": {
        • "vitality": -100,
        • "strength": -100,
        • "sensation": -100,
        • "dexterity": -100,
        • "agility": -100
        },
      • "weapon": { },
      • "ammo": {
        • "ammoTag": "9mm",
        • "damageBonus": -100,
        • "accuracyBonus": -100
        },
      • "melee": {
        • "accuracy": 100,
        • "damage": 9999,
        • "attackCount": 1,
        • "element": "NONE",
        • "attackCategory": "FIST",
        • "cost": 100,
        • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
        • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
        },
      • "fire": {
        • "accuracy": 100,
        • "damage": 9999,
        • "attackCount": 1,
        • "element": "NONE",
        • "attackCategory": "FIST",
        • "cost": 100,
        • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
        • "targetNum": "SINGLE",
        • "magazineSize": 1,
        • "reloadEffort": 1,
        • "ammoTag": "9mm"
        },
      • "book": {
        • "totalEffort": 1,
        • "skill": {
          • "targetSkill": "string",
          • "requiredLevel": 100,
          • "maxLevel": 100
          }
        }
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Items_create

アイテム作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

description
required
string (EntityDescription) [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

説明文

spriteSheetName
required
string (SpriteSheetName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトシート名

spriteKey
required
string (SpriteKey) [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトキー

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
value
required
integer <int32> (ItemValue) [ 0 .. 99999 ]

売買価格

weight
number <double> (ItemWeight) [ 0 .. 1000 ]

アイテム重量（kg）

inflictsDamage
integer <int32> (BaseDamage) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

基本ダメージ

providesNutrition
integer <int32> (NutritionAmount) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

栄養価

stackable
boolean (Stackable)

スタック可能かどうか

object (Consumable)

消費可能アイテムの設定

object (ProvidesHealing)

回復効果

object (Wearable)

装備可能設定

object (EquipBonus)

装備ボーナス

weapon
object (Weapon)

武器マーカー

object (Ammo)

弾薬設定

object (Melee)

近接攻撃設定

object (Fire)

遠距離攻撃設定

object (Book)

本の設定

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/items

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "spriteSheetName": "string",
  • "spriteKey": "string",
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "value": 99999,
  • "weight": 1000,
  • "inflictsDamage": 9999,
  • "providesNutrition": 9999,
  • "stackable": true,
  • "consumable": {
    • "usableScene": "BATTLE",
    • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
    • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
    },
  • "providesHealing": {
    • "valueType": "PERCENTAGE",
    • "amount": 9999,
    • "ratio": 1
    },
  • "wearable": {
    • "defense": 999,
    • "equipmentCategory": "HEAD",
    • "insulationCold": -100,
    • "insulationHeat": -100
    },
  • "equipBonus": {
    • "vitality": -100,
    • "strength": -100,
    • "sensation": -100,
    • "dexterity": -100,
    • "agility": -100
    },
  • "weapon": { },
  • "ammo": {
    • "ammoTag": "9mm",
    • "damageBonus": -100,
    • "accuracyBonus": -100
    },
  • "melee": {
    • "accuracy": 100,
    • "damage": 9999,
    • "attackCount": 1,
    • "element": "NONE",
    • "attackCategory": "FIST",
    • "cost": 100,
    • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
    • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
    },
  • "fire": {
    • "accuracy": 100,
    • "damage": 9999,
    • "attackCount": 1,
    • "element": "NONE",
    • "attackCategory": "FIST",
    • "cost": 100,
    • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
    • "targetNum": "SINGLE",
    • "magazineSize": 1,
    • "reloadEffort": 1,
    • "ammoTag": "9mm"
    },
  • "book": {
    • "totalEffort": 1,
    • "skill": {
      • "targetSkill": "string",
      • "requiredLevel": 100,
      • "maxLevel": 100
      }
    }
}

Items_get

アイテム詳細取得

path Parameters
index
required
integer <int32>

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/items/{index}

path Parameters
index
required
integer <int32>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

description
required

spriteSheetName
required
string (SpriteSheetName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

spriteKey

Items_delete

アイテム削除

path Parameters
index
required
integer <int32>

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/items/{index}

Response samples

  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string"
}

Members

Members_list

メンバー一覧取得

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/members

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "player": true,
      • "isBoss": true,
      • "abilities": {
        • "vitality": -100,
        • "strength": -100,
        • "sensation": -100,
        • "dexterity": -100,
        • "agility": -100,
        • "defense": -100
        },
      • "spriteSheetName": "string",
      • "spriteKey": "string",
      • "animKeys": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "lightSource": {
        • "radius": 1,
        • "color": {
          • "r": 0,
          • "g": 0,
          • "b": 0,
          • "a": 0
          },
        • "enabled": true
        },
      • "factionType": "FactionNeutral",
      • "disposition": "hostile",
      • "movementPattern": "random",
      • "viewDistance": 1,
      • "dialog": {
        • "messageKey": "string"
        },
      • "commandTableName": "string",
      • "dropTableName": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Members_create

メンバー作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

player
boolean (IsPlayer)

プレイヤーキャラクターかどうか

isBoss
required
boolean (IsBoss)

ボスモンスターかどうか

required
object (Abilities)

能力値

spriteSheetName
required
string (SpriteSheetName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトシート名

spriteKey
required
string (SpriteKey) [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトキー

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
object (LightSource)

光源設定

factionType
string (FactionMemberType)
Value: "FactionNeutral"

派閥タイプ

disposition
string (DispositionType)
Enum: "hostile" "neutral" "cowardly"

態度タイプ。エンティティの他者に対する初期態度を定義する

movementPattern
string (MovementPatternType)
Enum: "random" "patrol" "wallHug" "stationary" "wander" "territorial" "swarm"

非戦闘時の移動パターン

viewDistance
integer <int32> (ViewDistance) [ 1 .. 100 ]

AI視界距離（タイル単位）

object (Dialog)

会話データ

commandTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

dropTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/members

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "player": true,
  • "isBoss": true,
  • "abilities": {
    • "vitality": -100,
    • "strength": -100,
    • "sensation": -100,
    • "dexterity": -100,
    • "agility": -100,
    • "defense": -100
    },
  • "spriteSheetName": "string",
  • "spriteKey": "string",
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "lightSource": {
    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },
  • "factionType": "FactionNeutral",
  • "disposition": "hostile",
  • "movementPattern": "random",
  • "viewDistance": 1,
  • "dialog": {
    • "messageKey": "string"
    },
  • "commandTableName": "string",
  • "dropTableName": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default

{
  • "name": "string",

メンバー更新

path Parameters
index
required
integer <int32>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

player
boolean (IsPlayer)

プレイヤーキャラクターかどうか

isBoss
required
boolean (IsBoss)

ボスモンスターかどうか

required
object (Abilities)

能力値

spriteSheetName
required
string (SpriteSheetName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトシート名

spriteKey
required
string (SpriteKey) [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトキー

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
object (LightSource)

光源設定

factionType
string (FactionMemberType)
Value: "FactionNeutral"

派閥タイプ

disposition
string (DispositionType)
Enum: "hostile" "neutral" "cowardly"

態度タイプ。エンティティの他者に対する初期態度を定義する

movementPattern
string (MovementPatternType)
Enum: "random" "patrol" "wallHug" "stationary" "wander" "territorial" "swarm"

非戦闘時の移動パターン

viewDistance
integer <int32> (ViewDistance) [ 1 .. 100 ]

AI視界距離（タイル単位）

object (Dialog)

会話データ

commandTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

dropTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/members/{index}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "player": true,
  • "isBoss": true,
  • "abilities": {
    • "vitality": -100,
    • "strength": -100,
    • "sensation": -100,
    • "dexterity": -100,
    • "agility": -100,
    • "defense": -100
    },
  • "spriteSheetName": "string",
  • "spriteKey": "string",
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "lightSource": {
    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },
  • "factionType": "FactionNeutral",
  • "disposition": "hostile",
  • "movementPattern": "random",
  • "viewDistance": 1,
  • "dialog": {
    • "messageKey": "string"
    },
  • "commandTableName": "string",
  • "dropTableName": "string"
}

Tiles

Tiles_list

タイル一覧取得

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/tiles

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "blockPass": true,
      • "blockView": true,
      • "spriteRender": {
        • "spriteSheetName": "string",
        • "spriteKey": "string",
        • "depth": 0
        },
      • "shelter": 0,
      • "water": 0,
      • "foliage": 0
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Tiles_create

タイル作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

description
required
string (EntityDescription) [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

説明文

blockPass
required
boolean (BlocksPassage)

通行を妨げるかどうか

blockView
required
boolean (BlocksView)

視線を遮るかどうか

required
object (SpriteRender)

スプライトレンダー設定

shelter
required
number (ShelterType)
Enum: 0 5 10

遮蔽タイプ

water
required
number (WaterType)
Enum: 0 -5 -10

水タイプ

foliage
required
number (FoliageType)
Enum: 0 -1 -3

植生タイプ

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/tiles

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "blockPass": true,
  • "blockView": true,
  • "spriteRender": {
    • "spriteSheetName": "string",
    • "spriteKey": "string",
    • "depth": 0
    },
  • "shelter": 0,
  • "water": 0,
  • "foliage": 0
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "blockPass": true,
  • "blockView": true,
  • "spriteRender": {
    • "spriteSheetName": "string",
    • "spriteKey": "string",
    • "depth": 0
    },
  • "shelter": 0,
  • "water": 0,
  • "foliage": 0
}

Props

Props_list

置物一覧取得

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/props

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "spriteRender": {
        • "spriteSheetName": "string",
        • "spriteKey": "string",
        • "depth": 0
        },
      • "animKeys": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "blockPass": true,
      • "blockView": true,
      • "lightSource": {
        • "radius": 1,
        • "color": {
          • "r": 0,
          • "g": 0,
          • "b": 0,
          • "a": 0
          },
        • "enabled": true
        },
      • "door": { },
      • "doorLockTrigger": { },
      • "warpNextTrigger": { },
      • "warpEscapeTrigger": { },
      • "dungeonGateTrigger": { }
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Props_create

置物作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

description
required
string (EntityDescription) [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

説明文

required
object (SpriteRender)

スプライトレンダー設定

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
blockPass
required
boolean (BlocksPassage)

通行を妨げるかどうか

blockView
required
boolean (BlocksView)

視線を遮るかどうか

object (LightSource)

光源設定

door
object (DoorRaw)

扉ローデータ

doorLockTrigger
object (DoorLockTriggerRaw)

扉ロックトリガー

warpNextTrigger
object (WarpNextTriggerRaw)

次階層ワープトリガー

warpEscapeTrigger
object (WarpEscapeTriggerRaw)

脱出ワープトリガー

dungeonGateTrigger
object (DungeonGateTriggerRaw)

ダンジョン選択ゲートトリガー

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/props

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "spriteRender": {
    • "spriteSheetName": "string",
    • "spriteKey": "string",
    • "depth": 0
    },
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "blockPass": true,
  • "blockView": true,
  • "lightSource": {
    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },
  • "door": { },
  • "doorLockTrigger": { },
  • "warpNextTrigger": { },
  • "warpEscapeTrigger": { },
  • "dungeonGateTrigger": { }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "spriteRender": {
    • "spriteSheetName": "string",
    • "spriteKey": "string",
    • "depth": 0
    },
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "blockPass": true,
  • "blockView": true,
  • "lightSource": {
    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },
  • "door": { },
  • "doorLockTrigger": { },
  • "warpNextTrigger": { },
  • "warpEscapeTrigger": { },
  • "dungeonGateTrigger": { }
}

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/professions

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "abilities": {
        • "vitality": -100,
        • "strength": -100,
        • "sensation": -100,
        • "dexterity": -100,
        • "agility": -100,
        • "defense": -100
        },
      • "skills": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "value": 100
          }
        ],
      • "items": [
        • {
          • "name": "string",
          • "count": 1
          }
        ],
      • "equips": [
        • {
          • "name": "string",
          • "slot": "HEAD"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Professions_create

職業作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string (ProfessionId) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

職業ID

name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

description
required
string (EntityDescription) [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

説明文

required
object (Abilities)

能力値

Array of objects (ProfessionSkill)
required
Array of objects (ProfessionItem)
required
Array of objects (ProfessionEquip)

Palettes_delete

パレット削除

path Parameters
id
required
string

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/palettes/{id}

Response samples

  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string"
}

Models

Abilities

vitality
required
integer <int32> (Vitality) [ -100 .. 100 ]

体力。HPに影響する

strength
required
integer <int32> (Strength) [ -100 .. 100 ]

筋力。物理ダメージに影響する

sensation
required
integer <int32> (Sensation) [ -100 .. 100 ]

感覚。命中率と回避率に影響する

dexterity
required
integer <int32> (Dexterity) [ -100 .. 100 ]

器用さ。クリティカル率に影響する

agility
required
integer <int32> (Agility) [ -100 .. 100 ]

敏捷性。行動順に影響する

defense
required
integer <int32> (Defense) [ -100 .. 100 ]

防御力。被ダメージを軽減する

{
  • "vitality": -100,
  • "strength": -100,
  • "sensation": -100,
  • "dexterity": -100,
  • "agility": -100,
  • "defense": -100
}

Accuracy

integer <int32> (Accuracy) [ 0 .. 100 ]

命中率。0で必中なし、100で必中

100

AccuracyBonus

integer <int32> (AccuracyBonus) [ -100 .. 100 ]

命中率補正値

-100

ActionCost

integer <int32> (ActionCost) [ 0 .. 100 ]

行動コスト

100

Agility

integer <int32> (Agility) [ -100 .. 100 ]

敏捷性。行動順に影響する

-100

Ammo

ammoTag
string (AmmoTag)
Enum: "9mm" "rifle" "shell" "energy_cell"

弾薬タグ

damageBonus
required
integer <int32> (DamageBonus) [ -100 .. 100 ]

ダメージ補正値

accuracyBonus
required
integer <int32> (AccuracyBonus) [ -100 .. 100 ]

命中率補正値

{
  • "ammoTag": "9mm",
  • "damageBonus": -100,
  • "accuracyBonus": -100
}

AmmoTag

string (AmmoTag)
Enum: "9mm" "rifle" "shell" "energy_cell"

弾薬タグ

"9mm"

ArmorDefense

integer <int32> (ArmorDefense) [ 0 .. 999 ]

防具の防御力

999

AttackCategory

string (AttackCategory)
Enum: "FIST" "SWORD" "SPEAR" "HANDGUN" "RIFLE" "CANON" "BOW"

攻撃種別

"FIST"

AttackCount

integer <int32> (AttackCount) [ 1 .. 10 ]

1ターンあたりの攻撃回数

1

BaseDamage

integer <int32> (BaseDamage) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

基本ダメージ

9999

BlocksPassage

boolean (BlocksPassage)

通行を妨げるかどうか

true

BlocksView

boolean (BlocksView)

視線を遮るかどうか

true

Book

totalEffort
required
integer <int32> (ReadingEffort) [ 1 .. 9999 ]

読了に必要な総読書量

object (SkillBook)

スキル本設定

{
  • "totalEffort": 1,
  • "skill": {
